# zenfra_vcs_integration (Data Source)

Reads a single Zenfra VCS integration by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a VCS integration by name
data "zenfra_vcs_integration" "github" {
  name = "GitHub Org"
}

# Or by ID
data "zenfra_vcs_integration" "by_id" {
  id = "vcs-abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the VCS integration. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.
- `name` (String) The display name of the VCS integration. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `api_url` (String) API URL for GitLab integration. Only set for GitLab integrations.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the integration was created.
- `installation_id` (Number) GitHub App installation ID. Only set for GitHub integrations.
- `organization_id` (String) The organization ID this integration belongs to.
- `provider_type` (String) The VCS provider type (github or gitlab).
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the integration was last updated.
